subject: Split screen juxtaposant un script original manuscrit de L'Odyssée et un storyboard de 2001: L'Odyssée de l'espace
scene_description: Split screen symétrique : à gauche, un script original jauni de L'Odyssée de Kubrick, avec annotations manuscrites et papier texturé ; à droite, un storyboard technique de 2001 avec dessins au crayon et notes techniques. Les deux côtés sont éclairés doucement, créant un contraste entre le chaud du papier et le froid du storyboard.
style: Photorealistic, cinematic, HDR, 8K, vertical 9:16, soft diffused lighting, warm paper tones on left, cool blue tones on right, symmetry, shallow depth of field, professional documentary aesthetic
prompt: A cinematic split screen composition, left side shows an old handwritten script of Homer's Odyssey with Kubrick's annotations on warm aged paper, soft golden lighting, shallow depth of field; right side shows a technical storyboard for 2001: A Space Odyssey in cool blue tones, pencil drawings, film notes, soft diffused lighting, symmetrical composition, professional documentary style, hyperrealistic, HDR, 8K, vertical 9:16 aspect ratio, cinematic lighting, film grain, subtle vignette
negative_prompt: infographic, diagram, flowchart, text heavy, cluttered, stock photo, cartoon, illustration, painting, 3D render, low quality, blurry, distortion, watermark, signature, logo, frame, border, text overlay, bright colors, neon, oversaturated, flat lighting, hard shadows, unbalanced composition, deformed, distorted anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, oversaturated colors, horizontal crop, incorrect aspect ratio, plastic skin, jpeg artifacts, schematic, user interface, ui elements, app screenshot, bullet points, wall of text, powerpoint slide, presentation slide, table layout

metadata.goal: Montrer le paradoxe du projet abandonné qui a survécu sous une autre forme à travers un split screen entre le script original de L'Odyssée et le storyboard de 2001.
